← AEAOS
Kernel Capabilities
v2.0.0

7 Kernel Capabilities

DMS §4 · Capability Registry (PE-0 Everything Registry)
The pluggable, versioned, composable minimum units of intelligence — Reasoning, Planning, Consulting, Sales, Coaching, Training, Maintenance.

// Capability Registry

Every capability is the true-source in registry/capability.yaml and resolved by the Runtime at startup (Registry-first, P1). Capabilities cannot be enabled directly in Production — they advance through the environment promotion chain (P5).

AEAOS v2.0.0 — Enterprise AI Agent Operating System
Understand. Decide. Execute. Evolve.
